605 INTRVNS_MDCTN_OTHR_ADMSN_CD INTRVNS_MDCTN_OTHR_ADMSN_CD Other: IV - Other (Admission) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient was receiving other IV medications. 0 = No
